name: Jiangsu Hengli Hydraulic Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Hengli Hydraulic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells hydraulic components and systems worldwide. The company offers hydraulic, excavator, and customized cylinders; industrial and mobile valves; piston pumps; variable and fixed displacement motors; test benches; hydraulic systems; high precision castings; cold-drawn seamless tubes; surface coating solutions; and pneumatic products. Its products are used in excavating machinery, piling machinery, hoisting machinery, handling machinery, municipal equipment, tunnel machinery, mining machinery, concrete machinery, and other applications The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Hengli Highpressure Oil Cylinder Co., Ltd. Jiangsu Hengli Hydraulic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is based in Changzhou, China.
